message:
refactor(evaluator): consolidate external pack checking into core evaluation

Move external pack evaluation from separate post-evaluation checks in
cli.rs and main.rs into the core evaluate_packs_with_allowlists() function
in evaluator.rs.

Before:
- evaluate_command() checked only built-in packs
- main.rs and cli.rs each had duplicate code to check external packs
  after the main evaluation completed
- External packs were evaluated as a "fallback" after built-in packs

After:
- evaluate_packs_with_allowlists() now checks both built-in and external packs
- Pack resolution: try REGISTRY first, then external_store
- Single code path for all pack evaluation
- External packs participate in the same keyword index optimization
- Removed ~50 lines of duplicate fallback code

Benefits:
- Simpler control flow with single evaluation path
- External packs benefit from keyword index optimizations
- Consistent pattern matching behavior between built-in and external packs
- Easier to maintain and extend pack evaluation logic

The external_store lookup is integrated into both code paths:
1. Metadata-based filtering (might_match check)
2. Keyword index bitset filtering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
